case_title: RAY K. SHAHANI VS. EUGENE BULKIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAHANI, RAY K. AS TO DEFENDANT LAPCHUK, ANDRE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YEVGENY LAPCHUK WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION TRUE NAME AND ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT LAPCHUK, YEVGENY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO EUGENE BULKIN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-25-2016 AT 1:30 PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAHANI, RAY K. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAPCHUK, YEVGENY AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST EUGENE BULKIN AND ANDRE LAPCHUK ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALSO, AT PARTIES' REQUEST, YEVGENY LAPCHUK IS ADDED AS THE SOLE DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AND ANY OTHER IRREGULARITIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SHAHANI, RAY K. AS TO DEFENDANT BULKIN, EUGENE LAPCHUK, ANDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF UNCLAIMED COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BULKIN, EUGENE
